name: The Sketches
description: '''The Sketches''' ({{Langx|ur|دی سکیچز}}) is a Sufi folk rock band from [[Jamshoro]], [[Sindh]], [[Pakistan]], created by young musician [[Saif Samejo]]. "Sindhi melody is very charming; there is enormous flexibility of words" says Saif Samejo. Their motherland has always been a major inspiration which is portrayed in their work. The love for their language and culture is aimed to bring back the departed old identity and to produce quality work in order to sensitize the world in general and the youth in specific about the grace of [[Sindhi language]].
